directives.directive: FrontierLab is the user's dedicated repository for frontier paper reading/analysis, method-family comparison, reproduction logs, and lightweight tests. Prefer organizing knowledge by research direction, method family, paper status, comparison report, and reproduction status.

notes.content: FrontierLab directory convention: README.md as entry; indices/{directions,papers,methods,comparisons}.md as search/index layer; papers/<direction>/<year>-<slug>.md for single-paper analysis; comparisons/<direction>/<topic>.md for method comparisons; reproductions/<direction>/<method>/ for reproduction plans/runs; tests/ for lightweight checks; datasets/ for dataset metadata only; assets/ for small figures; notes/ for temporary notes; reports/ for legacy/long reports.
